info.english_meaning: to shine to glitter to glow to reign to be lustrous

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'aspfzwacaraRaM hyasya cUqAmaRimarIciBiH nIrAjayanti BUpAlAH pAdapIWAntaBUtalam' (pra0 ca0 28).. nIrAjayanti=BAsayanti=dIpayanti
'yaTAhamezAM vIrARAM virAjAni Danasya ca' (aTarva0 1296) vede rAjatirESvaryakarmA niyantA BavAnItyarTaH
'ezA BAgIraTI…vAteritA patAkeva virAjati naBasTale' (rA0 29719) virAjati SoBate
'vyarAjayata vEdehI veSma tat suviBUzitA udyatoMSumataH kAle KaM praBeva vivasvataH' (rA0 23918).. vyarAjayata=aSoBayat
'sadyo yaH spandro vizito DavIyAnfRo na tAyurati DanvA rAw' (f0 6125) atirAw atirAjati atikramya rAjate
'anUpopavanEH kAntEH kAntA (kAntyA) janamanoharA satArakA dyOriva sA dvArakA pratyarAjata' (hari0 25852).. pratyarAjata aSoBatA''tmanA
'vftAH suhfdBiH parirejurojasA yaTA sadasyE rfziBistrayo'gnayaH' (rA0 211233).. parirejuH parirarAjuH SuSuBire cakAsAmAsuH
